etymology.description: 電(電) (diàn, "electricity") + 源(源) (yuán, "source") = power source, a source of electricity.
etymology.interpretation: 電(電) (diàn, "electricity") refers to electrical current or anything related to electricity itself. 源(源) (yuán, "source") means origin or starting point of something. Together, 電源(電源) (diànyuán, "power source") literally suggests the origin or source from which electricity is drawn, capturing the concept of a power supply or energy provider.

examples.chinese: 这个设备需要外部电源(這個設備需要外部電源)。
examples.english: This device requires an external power source.

examples.chinese: 请检查电源是否连接正常(請檢查電源是否連接正常)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng jiǎnchá diànyuán shìfǒu liánjiē zhèngcháng.
examples.english: Please check if the power source is connected properly.

examples.chinese: 电脑无法启动，因为电源出问题了(電腦無法啓動，因為電源出問題了)。
examples.pinyin: Diànnǎo wúfǎ qǐdòng, yīnwèi diànyuán chū wèntí le.
examples.english: The computer cannot start because there is a problem with the power source.
